title: Ray Alvarez
compiled_truth: Ray Alvarez is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-02 to 2002-01-30), Ray Alvarez sent 116 and received 880 emails, totalling 996 interactions. Top correspondents: [Alan Comnes](people/alan-comnes) (86), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (80), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (77), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (74), [Leslie Lawner](people/leslie-lawner) (66). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, bill_williams_iii, california, california_issues, deleted_items, ferc.
